form.formComment: Returns from a four months spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing second over 425m at this track. Hard to entertain this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a four months spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing second over 425m at this track. Hard to entertain this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide on home turn; Checked turning out of front straight.
Slow to begin and raced wide in back straight.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 8 lengths (22.68) behind Star Fury in a Grade 5 on April 8. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 7th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 8 lengths (22.68) behind Star Fury in a Grade 5 on April 8. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide on home turn and in home straight.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by half a length at Ballarat over 390m (22.53) beating Paw Larry in Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 11. Can't recommend against this lot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by half a length at Ballarat over 390m (22.53) beating Paw Larry in Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 11. Can't recommend against this lot.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (25.88) over 450m at Ballarat. Squeeze draw to overcome. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (25.88) over 450m at Ballarat. Squeeze draw to overcome. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 2nd in a Special conditions Veteran race on April 7 over 410m at Horsham behind Lightning Jewel beaten 5 lengths (23.63). Prefer in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 2nd in a Special conditions Veteran race on April 7 over 410m at Horsham behind Lightning Jewel beaten 5 lengths (23.63). Prefer in something easier.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 450m at Ballarat. That followed a win two back in 25.77 beating Kid over 450m at Shepparton. Others favoured this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 450m at Ballarat. That followed a win two back in 25.77 beating Kid over 450m at Shepparton. Others favoured this time.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Shepparton (22.82) in a Special conditions Veteran race, finishing a 3.5 lengths third. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from seven starts. Leading player.
